text: its 40 degrees in march what is this nonsense i put my coat away already

left the house without an umbrella and the sky took that personally
seasonal depression hit different this year. like a truck different.

the weatherman said partly sunny. that was a whole lie
i scraped ice off my car for 20 min just to drive 5 min to work
ac wars in this office are worse than game of thrones
spring forward? more like spring off a cliff i need that hour back

november hits and suddenly i am eating cereal for dinner in the dark
46 degrees and my neighbor is already mowing the lawn in shorts
the humidity today turned my hair into a whole separate organism

rain forecast said 20% so i risked it. it was the 20%
turned the heat on in the morning and the ac on by afternoon. ohio things
daylight savings has me eating dinner at what feels like midnight
my windshield wipers froze to my windshield. cool cool cool
summer ac bill just dropped and i think i need to sell a kidney
walked outside in january and the cold air punched me in the chest
why do ppl act like 30 degrees is shorts weather ur not impressing anyone

fall back means its dark when i leave work and dark when i arrive. love it
forecast: sunny. reality: apocalyptic thunderstorm. ok weather app ok

the wind chill is -10 but sure lets still have outdoor seating
i brought an umbrella today and it didnt rain. ur welcome everyone
seasonal depression + daylight savings = me in bed at 6pm no regrets
ac on full blast and im still sweating through my shirt at my desk
drove through a puddle that turned out to be a lake. car is now a submarine
my weather app has a different forecast every time i refresh it pick a lane
winter makes me want to hibernate like a bear but capitalism said no
woke up to frost on the INSIDE of my window. my apartment is a freezer
the sun came out for 5 minutes and everyone in the office ran outside like meerkats

putting on sunscreen in march feels wrong but here we are

just watched a guy in flip flops walk through 3 inches of snow. respect
my vitamin d levels are so low i think im becoming a mushroom
rain during lunch break is a personal attack on my sandwich plans
its been cloudy for 11 days straight. i forgot what the sun looks like

winter mornings make me question every life choice that led me to this city

i wore layers and its suddenly 70 degrees. im a walking sauna now
sprinklers went off during a rainstorm. the grass is double hydrated i guess
hail dented my car and my soul on the same tuesday

tornado warning and my roommate is on the porch trying to film it

summer mosquitoes treat me like an all you can eat buffet
forecast said light drizzle. my socks are soaked through. light drizzle my foot
its snowing horizontally and my boss asked if im still coming in. yes todd. yes
ac so cold in this store i could hang meat in the produce section
sun came out and immediately gave me a headache. thanks i hate it
